items.title: Home Depot (HD) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback
items.description: Home Depot (HD) has had a choppy run lately, with the stock down over the past month and past 3 months even as revenue and net income keep inching higher, which sets up an interesting disconnect. See our latest analysis for Home Depot. Zooming out, that recent pullback fits into a wider cooling trend, with the share price down year to date even as the three and five year total shareholder returns remain solidly positive. This suggests momentum is fading, but the longer term story is...
